title: Tony Parker's mansion slashes price: Texas estate drops to $11 million; despite luxury features, still seeking buyer
summary_full: Tony Parker's Texas mansion has seen another significant price reduction. The sprawling estate is now listed for eleven million dollars after several adjustments. This luxurious property features an enormous private water park and extensive sports facilities. Despite extensive publicity and a past peak price of twenty million dollars, it remains unsold. The highly customized luxury estate continues its search for a new owner.
